source_script_line: Scarline steadies the space without shutting Static down.
staging_intent: Static mid-ground before the glowing departure boards, agitated but contained; Scarline nearer camera at a deliberate, respectful distance, calm and planted, facing him. The gap between them is support-without-crowding -- same spatial storytelling as P06_PANEL02.

characters.action: ears tracking the boards' off-rhythm clicks, hunched

reflection.note: Polished tile reflects everything standing on it (per the plate note); soft reflection, not a hard puddle mirror.

characters.asset_note: Clean-base (calm, steady) rather than worried -- the beat is Scarline as the stable anchor. Gaze reads slightly viewer-left, so she is placed screen-right of Static so it lands on him.

ground_contact.surface: edge of the large right mirror puddle

reflection.note: She stands at the big right puddle; hard mirror reflection clipped to it.
